mapper.sql: t.id, t.timeline_id, t.order_id, t.event_type, t.event_name, t.before_status, t.after_status, t.operator_id, t.operator_role, t.operate_source, t.related_doc_no, t.external_system_name, t.result, t.fail_reason, t.event_remark, t.event_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_timeline t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.event_time DESC
SELECT FROM vso_order_timeline t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_timeline t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_timeline ( timeline_id, order_id, event_type, event_name, before_status, after_status, operator_id, operator_role, operate_source, related_doc_no, external_system_name, result, fail_reason, event_remark, event_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{timelineId}, #{orderId}, #{eventType}, #{eventName}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorRole}, #{operateSource}, #{relatedDocNo}, #{externalSystemName}, #{result}, #{failReason}, #{eventRemark}, #{eventTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_timeline ( timeline_id, order_id, event_type, event_name, before_status, after_status, operator_id, operator_role, operate_source, related_doc_no, external_system_name, result, fail_reason, event_remark, event_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.timelineId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.eventType}, #{item.eventName}, #{item.beforeStatus}, #{item.afterStatus}, #{item.operatorId}, #{item.operatorRole}, #{item.operateSource}, #{item.relatedDocNo}, #{item.externalSystemName}, #{item.result}, #{item.failReason}, #{item.eventRemark}, #{item.eventTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_timeline t SET
t.result = #{result},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.event_remark = #{eventRemark},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_timeline t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
